steps.title: Base Extrusion
steps.desc:
First, ensure the extrusion is clean of debris.

**BOM for this step:**
- 1x Aluminum Extrusion (2040)
- 1x MGN12H Linear Rail (300mm)
- 12x M3x8mm Button Head Screws
- 12x M3 T-Nuts

steps.title: Corner Brackets
steps.desc: 123 Attach the L-brackets. GAGAGAGAGAGAg. AKAKJAKAJAKAKJ. AAKHakahkahakhakah

steps.title: Y-Axis Motor
steps.desc: Mount the NEMA 17 motor to the rear plate.
